entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental changes causing adverse effects on crop productivity and nutritional content

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural yield affected by climate change

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL CONTENT
entities.description: The level of nutrients present in crops, influenced by climate and biofortification

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient and nutritious food

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: A strategy to develop crop cultivars enriched in essential micronutrients

entities.name: ESSENTIAL MICRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Vital minerals required for human health, targeted for enrichment in crops

entities.name: NUTRIENT DEFICIENCIES
entities.description: The lack of essential micronutrients in the human diet

entities.name: GRAIN FORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of enhancing mineral content in the seed endosperm or cotyledon

entities.name: MINERAL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of minerals present in the seed of a crop

entities.name: SOIL NUTRITIONAL STATUS
entities.description: The availability and state of nutrients within the soil

entities.name: BIOAVAILABILITY OF MINERALS
entities.description: The degree and rate at which minerals are absorbed and used by plants

entities.name: RHIZOSPHERE
entities.description: The soil region immediately surrounding plant roots

entities.name: SINK ORGANS
entities.description: Plant organs where nutrients are transported and stored

entities.name: MICROORGANISMS
entities.description: Biological entities that improve soil health and facilitate mineral breakdown

entities.name: SOIL HEALTH
entities.description: The state of the soil that supports plant growth and nutrient availability

entities.name: BIOGEOCHEMICAL CYCLES
entities.description: The pathways through which trace elements are broken down and recycled in the environment

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH-PROMOTING MICROBES
entities.description: Microbes that enhance the bioavailability of minerals to crop plants

entities.name: ACTINOMYCETES
entities.description: A specific group of plant growth-promoting microbes that enhance mineral bioavailability

entities.name: HIDDEN HUNGER
entities.description: A form of undernutrition characterized by micronutrient deficiencies

entities.name: TRADITIONAL AGRICULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Conventional farming methods used to enhance nutritional quality

entities.name: MODERN APPROACHES
entities.description: Contemporary scientific methods used to enhance nutritional quality
